prestazioni: Replace the stock Ford Duratec 2.0L (engine code: *Duratec-R*) with a fully built *Cosworth-tuned Duratec-R* featuring forged Mahle pistons (87.5mm bore, 9.0:1 CR), Carrillo H-beam rods, and a billet crankshaft (76.4mm stroke) for a 2.3L stroker configuration. Pair with a *Tomei 272° camshaft* (intake/exhaust) and *Ferrea 5000-series valves* (1mm oversized) with *Supertech dual valve springs* and titanium retainers. Port and polish the cylinder head with *3-angle valve seats* and a *Cosworth high-flow intake manifold* matched to a *Jenvey 45mm ITB kit* (individual throttle bodies) with *K&N 62mm velocity stacks*.

Install a *Garrett GT3076R turbocharger* (0.86 A/R turbine housing, 56 trim compressor) on a *custom 304 stainless steel header* (equal-length, 1.75" primaries) with a *Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate* and *TurboSmart Kompact 50mm blow-off valve*. Use a *Pectel SQ6M ECU* with *Motec C127 dash* for real-time tuning, paired with a *Radium Engineering dual-catch can system* and *Mocal oil cooler* (19-row, 13-row stacked) with *AN-10 braided lines*.

Swap the stock 6-speed Caterham gearbox for a *Quaife ATB differential* (80% lock) paired with a *Hewland LD200 sequential transaxle* (dog-ring engagement, 2.69:1 final drive). Upgrade the clutch to a *Tilton 7.25" triple-plate ceramic unit* with *AP Racing master/slave cylinders*. Replace the stock driveshafts with *GKN CV-jointed half-shafts* (25-spline, 300M steel) and fit *Ohlins TTX40 coilovers* (2-way adjustable, 200lb/in springs) with *polyurethane bushings* (SuperPro) and *Rose-jointed front wishbones*.
estetica: Fit a *Caterham Motorsport carbon-fiber aero package* (front splitter, rear diffuser, and side skirts) with *Duckworks Composites carbon-fiber bonnet* (louvered, quick-release pins). Replace the stock windscreen with a *Momo carbon-fiber single-seater screen* and add *Sparco 6-point harnesses* (Pro 2000 series) mounted to a *Custom Cages T45 roll cage* (gusseted, powder-coated in *Gloss Anthracite*).

Install *OMP carbon-fiber racing seats* (Superleggera model, 12kg each) with *Schroth 4-point harnesses* and *Sabelt HANS-compatible head restraints*. Replace the stock steering wheel with a *Momo Prototipo* (330mm, suede, quick-release) and add a *Motec C127 digital dash* (12.3" display) with *AIM Solo 2 DL GPS lap timer*.

Apply a *3M Vinyl Wrap* (Matte Military Green with *gloss black accents*) and add *LED halo headlights* (Osram Night Breaker, 6000K) with *custom carbon-fiber headlight surrounds*. Fit *Dymag Racing wheels* (15x7 front, 15x9 rear, *carbon-fiber rims*, 3.5kg each) wrapped in *Avon ZZR tires* (185/55R15 front, 245/45R15 rear) with *Brembo GT 4-piston calipers* (330mm rotors, *2-piece floating*) and *Ferodo DS2500 brake pads*.
